title: How Two Devs used Kiro to win a Robotics Hackathon and Fund their Startup
summary: Jason and Chidi built Gofer AI, a robotics platform using imitation learning, with Kiro at the LabLab AI hackathon. They won the hackathon and secured funding. Kiro enabled spec-driven development of a modular robotics pipeline including video input, motion extraction, and Isaac Sim replay.
